name:
HOLY THURSDAY
MASS OF THE LORD'S SUPPER

lectionary.thematicTag: Holy Thursday — Mass of the Lord's Supper

readings.summary: The Lord instructs Moses for the first Passover.

readings.citation:
Ps 116:12-13, 15-16bc, 17-18
Our blessing-cup is a communion with the Blood of Christ.
readings.antiphon: Our blessing-cup is a communion with the Blood of Christ.

readings.summary:
I give you a new commandment, says the Lord:
love one another as I have loved you.
Jesus washes the feet of his disciples.

antiphons.text:
We should glory in the Cross of our Lord Jesus Christ,
in whom is our salvation, life and resurrection,
through whom we are saved and delivered.

planningNotes: THU 7 PM — single combined celebration, all ensembles
Foot Washing follows the homily; Transfer of Blessed Sacrament closes the liturgy
Reception of Oils: Musical Setting by Ed Archer (Choral Dir: Tica)
Dismissal of Catechumens: Trevor Thomson (Choral Dir: Tica)

Foot Washing: Wash Their Feet (Pepper Choplin) → This Is How (Chris de Silva, BPM 66/78, Choral Dir: Merrick) → The Servant Song (Richard Gillard, arr. Ed Archer, SATB, BPM ca.80/78, Choral Dir: Merrick) → Make Me a Channel of Your Peace (John Angotti, ATB, BPM ca.60/66, Choral Dir: Tica) → Jesus Christ Yesterday Today and Forever (Suzanne Toolan, ostinato refrain only, Choral Dir: Tica)

Emergency Foot Washing Tunes: Healing Waters (Trevor Thomson, BPM 96/86, Choral Dir: Merrick), More Like Jesus (Passion, BPM 144, Choral Dir: Arielle), Healed In Christ (Sarah Hart, BPM 76, Choral Dir: Arielle)
Presentation of Gifts: Take Lord Receive (John Foley, BPM 65/68, Choral Dir: Tica)
Meditation (after Communion): Unless A Grain of Wheat (John Angotti, SATB, BPM ca.60/64, Choral Dir: Tica)
Transfer of Eucharist: Ubi Caritas (Berthier/Taize, BPM 76, Choral Dir: Tica)
Adoration: Pange Lingua (Chant Mode III, Liber Hymnarius, Randall DeBruyn, Choral Dir: Tica)
Adoration: Stay With Me (Berthier/Taize, Choral Dir: Tica)
BUY: From An Upper Room (Joseph M. Martin)

massNotes: Reception of Oils: Musical Setting by Ed Archer (Choral Dir: Tica)
Gloria Vocal Arr: David Lockwood & Arielle Phan (Choral Dir: Arielle, minimal direction needed)
Foot Washing: Wash Their Feet (Choplin) → This Is How (de Silva) → The Servant Song (Gillard/Archer, SATB) → Make Me a Channel (Angotti, ATB) → Jesus Christ Yesterday (Toolan, ostinato only)
Emergency FW: Healing Waters (Thomson), More Like Jesus (Passion), Healed In Christ (Hart)
Dismissal of Catechumens: Trevor Thomson (Choral Dir: Tica)
Preparation of Altar: From An Upper Room (Martin, SATB, BUY) — alt: Do Not Be Afraid (Jeanne Cotter)
Presentation of Gifts: Take Lord Receive (John Foley, BPM 65/68)
Meditation: Unless A Grain of Wheat (Angotti, SATB, BPM ca.60/64)
Transfer of Eucharist: Ubi Caritas (Berthier/Taize, BPM 76)
Adoration: Pange Lingua (Chant Mode III) → Stay With Me (Berthier/Taize)

prelude.title: Call to Remembrance
prelude.description: SATB — alt: Shelter Your Name (Danielle Rose, SATB, Choral Dir: Arielle)

gathering.title: The House that Love Is Building

gospelAcclamation.title: Praise to You, Lord Jesus Christ
gospelAcclamation.verse: I give you a new commandment, says the Lord: love one another as I have loved you.

offertory.title: From An Upper Room
offertory.description: BPM 94 — alt: Do Not Be Afraid (Jeanne Cotter)

communionSongs.title: Do This In Memory of Me
The Table of the Lord
communionSongs.description: BPM 72 — alt: Here I Am Lord (Dan Schutte, arr. Lockwood & Bonilla)
